name: Squid Survival Run Challenge
description: Are you looking for a game with survival challenges? Do you love playing deadly games where the only goal is survival? If yes, then look no further than the Squid Survival Run Challenge. It is a 3d game based on the exciting and trending squid survival games. In this squid game, you get deadly challenges where you have to use different strategies and fast reflexes to become the survival and get the big reward! Each level of this squid survival is more difficult than the previous, so you must be very careful in every step or strategy you use.
